title: Ironman's Repulsor
description: Changes the crossbow to look and sound like Ironman's Repulsor!
body:
## Ironman's Repulsor!

This resource pack changes the look and sounds of the crossbow to Ironman's iconic Repulsor.
This resrouce pack currently only works with the right hand as the main hand but I am working on making it for left hand users as well!

I would appreciate it if you credited me if you use it in a video, thanks!

Enjoy!
